notes.turf: corner wedges + side strips (15/16/17); the 5-14 CI8 greens are transformation variants not shown on the normal stage
notes.turf_pattern: the MAIN FIELD luminance sheets (18 + 46-49/52). LIMITATION: the field's green is MATANIM-driven (the transformation system re-asserts it every frame) - neither texture pushes NOR static material tints recolor it; would need matanim color-track editing. Pattern edits via these sheets show as luminance only
notes.deck: the gray platform ring around the turf (grayscale sheets 0-4 + 9)
notes.walls: stadium wall/billboard sections (incl. the 288x256 olives 22-27, which are walls NOT deck)
notes.18: the white Pokeball center circle - protected
notes.limitations: the jumbotron screen content is engine-rendered text; crowd masks are I4/I8 - unmapped
notes.method: regions localized via chunked solid-color in-game captures (skinlab_stage_diag --chunks), 2026-06-11
